full_text:
Cao Biao (Zhuhu) 曹彪 (朱虎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Biao (曹彪), styledZhuhu (朱虎), was born in Pei. Cao Zhi wrote a poem about him. Cao Biao would later be found guilty of treason. Cao Biao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Biao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
